ip-001.description: Create IAuthService interface defining auth contract: signIn, signUp, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange
ip-001.rationale: Per finding-001/002: follow IPersistenceService pattern with async methods, null returns

ip-002.description: Define AuthUser, AuthSession, AuthResult domain types matching schema entities
ip-002.rationale: Types shared between service interface and MST models

ip-003.description: Create SupabaseAuthService implementing IAuthService, wrapping @supabase/supabase-js client
ip-003.rationale: Per finding-010: singleton service pattern. Browser-only (uses Supabase SDK)

ip-004.description: Create MockAuthService implementing IAuthService with in-memory user/session storage for tests
ip-004.rationale: Per finding-003: follow NullPersistence pattern for test doubles

ip-005.description: Extend IEnvironment.services to include optional auth?: IAuthService
ip-005.rationale: Per finding-001: services injected via environment, not imported directly

ip-006.description: Create AuthStateMixin with initialize(), syncFromSupabase(), signIn(), signUp(), signOut() actions
ip-006.rationale: Per finding-004/005 and dd-auth-003: composable mixin for auth actions in root store

ip-007.description: Create createAuthEnhancementHooks() returning enhanceModels, enhanceCollections, enhanceRootStore functions
ip-007.rationale: Per dd-auth-003: enhancement hooks for computed views (isExpired, isAuthenticated, currentUser)

ip-008.description: Create barrel export for auth module: types, services, mixin, hooks

ip-009.description: Create AuthProvider and useAuth() hook wrapping MST auth store with React Context
ip-009.rationale: Per finding-009: follow WavesmithStoreContext pattern for app-wide auth state

ip-010.description: Create LoginForm component with email/password inputs, error display, loading state
ip-010.rationale: Per finding-012: no existing auth components - need to create

ip-011.description: Create SignupForm component with email/password inputs, confirmation, verification message
ip-011.rationale: Per finding-012: no existing auth components - need to create

ip-012.description: Create ProtectedRoute wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users to login
ip-012.rationale: Per finding-013: flat routing needs guards for protected pages

ip-013.description: Create UserMenu component showing current user info and logout button
ip-013.rationale: Common UI pattern for authenticated state display

ip-014.description: Create barrel export for Auth components

ip-015.description: Wrap app with AuthProvider, add /login and /signup routes, wrap protected routes
ip-015.rationale: Per finding-013: integrate auth into existing routing

ip-016.description: Create LoginPage hosting LoginForm with redirect on success

ip-017.description: Create SignupPage hosting SignupForm with verification flow

ip-018.description: Create unit tests for IAuthService implementations using MockAuthService
ip-018.rationale: Per finding-008: follow test isolation pattern with mock service reset

ip-019.description: Create unit tests for AuthStateMixin with mock auth service
